zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany於1296年出生在法國布列塔尼時，她的父親Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne35歲，母親Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort33歲。她於1323年9月21日與Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年3月24日在法國享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany于1296年出生在法国布列塔尼时，她的父亲Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne35岁，母亲Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort33岁。她于1323年9月21日与Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1363年3月24日在法国享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany was born in 1296, in Brittany, France, her father, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, was 35 and her mother, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, was 33. She married Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle on 21 September 1323. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 24 March 1363, in France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany est née en 1296, à Bretagne, France, son père, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle le 21 septembre 1323. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 24 mars 1363, à France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany 1296 in Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne 35 und ihre Mutter Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort 33. Sie hat am 21. September 1323 Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. März 1363 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany è nata il nel 1296 nel Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle il 21 settembre 1323. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 marzo 1363, nel Francia, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittanyが1296年にフランスブレタグンで生まれた時，父Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagneは35歳，母Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfortは33歳であった。1323年9月21日にRobert Of Flanders,  Count of Marleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1363年3月24日にフランスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany(이)가 1296년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1323년 9월 21일 Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 3월 24일 프랑스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany nasceu em 1296, em Bretagne, França, seu pai, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle em 21 de setembro de 1323. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 24 de março de 1363, em França, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany родилась в 1296 г. в местности бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle 21 сентября 1323 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 24 марта 1363 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne De Bretagne Princess of Brittany nació en 1296, en Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Arthur II de Bretagne Duc de Bretagne, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Yolande de Dreux Countess of Monfort, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Robert Of Flanders,  Count of Marle el 21 de septiembre de 1323. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1363, en Francia, a la edad de 67 años.
